LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: DEFENDANT BMW OF NORTH AMERICA LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. MATTER CONTESTED, ARGUMENT HELD, AND THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN 10 COURT DAYS OF THE FILING OF THE COURT ORDER. DEFENSE COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: JOHN M. TRUE III. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. MATTER NOT REPORTED. BAILIFF: NOT PRESENT. (302/JMT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-27-2026 Continued To Feb-22-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Mar-12-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Ryan Ardi, Esq. for Plaintiff;
Gayatri Raghunandan, Esq. for Defendant BMW.

Hearing re: Defendant BMW Of North America LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

The matter is contested. Argument is held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court grants the motion with leave to amend within 10 court days of the filing of the court order.

At the request of Mr. Ardi, the Court notes that the amendment may include the statutory code pertaining to the Song-Beverly Act.

Defense counsel is to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: John M. True III. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (302/JMT)

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2026 Continued To Mar-12-26 At 01:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court having received timely contest of the tentative ruling continues the matter as follows:

DEFENDANT BMW OF NORTH AMERICA LLC's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS:

the matter will be heard on March 12, 2026 at 1:00 p.m before Judge True in department 302.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (302/JMT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-15-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
